name: Digital Multimeter 600V DC/AC 10A DC
tagline: India's most popular budget digital multimeter — pocket-sized, proven quality, unbeatable economy.
description: The Vartech V MAS 830 LB is the highest-selling budget digital multimeter in India — and for good reason. It delivers reliable voltage, current and resistance measurement in a compact, pocket-friendly body at a price point that makes it the default choice for electricians, students and technicians who need a dependable everyday meter without spending a fortune. Backed by ISO 9001 certified manufacturing, it is the one meter every toolkit should have.
features: Measures AC/DC voltage up to 600 V, DC current from 200 µA to 10 A, and resistance up to 2 MΩ — covers everyday electrical work completely
Blue backlight display — read measurements clearly in dark panels, junction boxes and low-light environments
Audible continuity test — instantly confirms circuit connections with a beep, no need to look at the display
Transistor (hFE) test — check NPN/PNP transistors for gain without a separate component tester
Data Hold — freeze the reading on screen and record it at your own pace
Holster with stand — hands-free bench use; the meter stands upright while you work

name: True RMS Digital Multimeter
tagline: Pocket-sized True RMS multimeter with NCV, double fuse protection and 200 MΩ resistance range.
description: The Vartech V 830 L+ is built for professionals who work on modern electrical systems — inverters, variable frequency drives, switching power supplies and non-linear loads — where only a True RMS meter gives you the correct reading. With a resistance range up to 200 MΩ, a sensitive 20 µA current range, Non-Contact Voltage (NCV) detection, built-in torch and double fuse protection, it packs professional-grade capability into a pocket-friendly body built with superior components for unparalleled reliability.
features: True RMS measurement — gives accurate readings on non-sinusoidal AC loads like VFDs, inverters and switched-mode power supplies where average-responding meters give false readings
Non-Contact Voltage (NCV) detection — safely identify live conductors without probing; essential for safe working practice
Resistance up to 200 MΩ — measure insulation resistance for spot checks, and test high-value resistors in electronics circuits
Sensitive 20 µA DC current range — test low-power sensor circuits and electronic loads that standard meters cannot resolve
Double fuse protection (200 mA & 10 A) — protects the meter and the user from current overloads in both current measurement ranges
Built-in torch / flashlight — illuminate dark panels and enclosures without a separate light
Shockproof body with built-in holster and stand — handles the rigours of daily field use

name: Full Function Digital Multimeter True RMS
tagline: Full-function True RMS multimeter with capacitance measurement, live wire detection and 200 MΩ resistance range.
description: The Vartech M 890 is a full-function True RMS digital multimeter for technicians who need to go beyond basic measurements. With a voltage range up to 1000 V DC / 750 V AC, capacitance measurement, Live Wire detection, a wide resistance range up to 200 MΩ and transistor testing — all in a single instrument — it is the complete solution for electrical panel work, motor drive servicing and electronics troubleshooting.
features: True RMS measurement up to 1000 V DC / 750 V AC — accurate on inverter outputs, motor drives and any non-sinusoidal waveform
Live Wire (LIVE) detection — identifies energised conductors before you make contact, a critical safety feature for panel and switchgear work
Capacitance measurement from 20 nF to 200 µF — test capacitors in power supplies, motor start circuits and electronic boards
Resistance range up to 200 MΩ — suitable for insulation spot-checks and high-value component testing
Transistor (hFE) test with NPN/PNP polarity detection — component-level diagnosis without a separate tester
Auto Power Off with Low Battery indicator — field-ready design that conserves battery life

name: Digital Multimeter True RMS Auto Ranging
tagline: 6000-count True RMS auto-ranging multimeter with temperature, frequency up to 2 MHz, duty cycle and NCV.
description: The Vartech V 92 is a new-generation True RMS digital multimeter engineered for electrical engineers, electronics professionals and HVAC technicians who need more than a basic meter. With 6000 counts, auto-ranging, frequency measurement up to 2 MHz, duty cycle, temperature and capacitance — all in a compact ergonomic body with overload protection and NCV — it is the complete all-in-one field instrument for demanding diagnostic work.
features: 6000-count auto-ranging True RMS — three times the resolution of a standard 2000-count meter, eliminates manual range selection and gives accurate readings on any waveform
Frequency measurement up to 2 MHz including in the ACV range — ideal for VFD and motor drive testing, signal tracing and control system diagnostics
Duty cycle measurement — essential for diagnosing PWM motor controllers, switching regulators and pulse-based control circuits
Temperature measurement from −20 °C to 1000 °C (probe included) — one meter for both electrical and thermal measurements
Capacitance measurement up to 2 mF across 7 auto-ranging ranges — test capacitors without leaving the instrument or switching tools
Overload protection — guards the meter against voltage spikes, surges and accidental high-voltage connections
Non-Contact Voltage (NCV) detection with torch — safely identify live conductors and illuminate dark enclosures simultaneously
Relative measurement (REL) and Data Hold — compare readings against a reference or capture a reading hands-free

name: Smart Digital Multimeter True RMS Auto Ranging
tagline: Fully automatic Smart Digital Multimeter — intelligent mode auto-detects what you're measuring, dual display and analog bar graph.
description: The Vartech V 92 S is Vartech's intelligent Smart Digital Multimeter — it thinks for you. In Intelligent mode, the meter automatically detects the measurement function and sets the range without any input from the user, making it the fastest and safest multimeter for repetitive field testing. A dual primary and secondary display with analog bar graph lets you monitor two parameters simultaneously, while the Jack Prompt and Burnt Fuse warning actively protect you and the instrument from connection errors.
features: Intelligent mode with automatic function and range detection — point, probe and read; the meter identifies voltage, current, resistance or continuity and configures itself instantly
Dual display (primary + secondary) with analog bar graph — monitor two parameters at once; the bar graph reveals signal fluctuations and trends that digits alone can miss
Jack Prompt and Burnt Fuse warning — alerts you before a misconnection damages the meter; critical safety features absent on standard multimeters
True RMS 6000 counts — accurate measurement on any waveform including non-sinusoidal loads; 3× the resolution of basic meters
Extended temperature range to −40 °C — reliable in cold-weather environments and refrigeration plant testing
Capacitance up to 60 mF, frequency up to 10 MHz — covers capacitor testing and high-frequency circuit work beyond standard meter capability
NCV with audio and visual indication, torch and auto power off — complete set of field-safety features in one instrument

name: Digital Multimeter True RMS 1000V DC / 750V AC 20A
tagline: Heavy-duty True RMS industrial multimeter — 1000V DC, 20A, auto-ranging capacitance and NCV in a shockproof body.
description: The Vartech V 890 D is built for industrial environments where lightweight consumer meters simply are not enough. With a True RMS measurement range up to 1000 V DC / 750 V AC, a 20 A current range, auto-ranging capacitance up to 20 mF and mains frequency verification in the 750 V AC range, it handles the full demands of electrical panel testing, motor drive commissioning and power distribution work. Heavy-duty shockproof construction and double AA battery operation make it a reliable companion for extended field sessions.
features: True RMS up to 1000 V DC / 750 V AC — correct readings on any waveform; handles the highest industrial distribution voltages
20 A current measurement range — measure motor running current and panel feeder loads without a separate clamp meter
Auto-ranging capacitance up to 20 mF (8 ranges) — test motor start and run capacitors, power factor correction capacitors and electrolytic capacitors across a wide range
Mains frequency measurement in the 750 V AC range — verify supply frequency directly at the panel terminals
NCV detection with torch — identify live conductors and illuminate dark enclosures simultaneously for safe working
Heavy-duty shockproof body with built-in holster and stand — engineered to survive the job site; not a desktop meter in a rubber boot
Double AA battery operation — longer battery life than AAA alternatives; more field time between battery changes

name: Digital Multimeter True RMS Auto Ranging 1000V DC / 750V AC 10A
tagline: Flagship 4000-count True RMS multimeter — CAT III 1000V / CAT IV 600V, frequency up to 20 MHz, auto/manual ranging.
description: The Vartech V 68 is the flagship handheld True RMS digital multimeter — engineered for senior electrical engineers, automation and drives professionals who demand the highest standards from a handheld instrument. With 4000 counts, auto and manual ranging, frequency measurement up to 20 MHz, duty cycle, and a micro-current range from 400 µA, it bridges the gap between everyday field work and precision measurement in a single robust instrument.
features: 4000-count True RMS with auto and manual ranging — twice the resolution of 2000-count meters; auto-ranging eliminates range selection errors while manual mode gives full control when needed
Frequency measurement up to 20 MHz — covers power line, audio, industrial control, telecommunications and harmonic analysis far beyond the capability of standard multimeters
Duty cycle measurement — diagnose PWM motor drives, switching regulators, UPS and any pulse-based control system without a separate instrument
Micro-current from 400 µA in both AC and DC — sensitive enough for low-power sensor circuits, control loops and electronic measurement without risk of overload
Temperature to 1000 °C and capacitance up to 100 mF — total component and environmental characterisation in one meter
Double fuse overload protection — safeguards both the meter and the operator against fault currents in both current measurement ranges
NCV, torch, REL measurement and data hold — every essential field tool in one instrument

name: LCR Digital Multimeter True RMS 1000V DC / 750V AC 20A
tagline: Unique handheld LCR meter and full-function True RMS multimeter combined — measures inductance, capacitance, resistance, frequency and temperature.
description: The Vartech V 8222 H is a unique instrument: a professional LCR meter and a full-function True RMS multimeter combined into a single heavy-duty handheld body. Where every other multimeter stops at capacitance, the V 8222 H adds inductance measurement across a wide 2 mH to 20 H range — making it indispensable for electronics engineers, R&D professionals and anyone working with coils, transformers, inductors, motors and passive components. It eliminates the need for both a separate LCR bridge and a field multimeter.
features: Inductance measurement from 2 mH to 20 H (2 auto ranges) — the defining capability that no standard multimeter offers; test chokes, transformers, motor windings and inductors directly
Full LCR capability: Inductance, Capacitance (20 nF to 2 mF) and Resistance (up to 200 MΩ) in one handheld instrument — replace your LCR bridge and your field multimeter
True RMS up to 1000 V DC / 750 V AC and 20 A — full heavy-duty multimeter capability alongside LCR measurement
Frequency measurement up to 20 MHz with duty cycle — covers power, audio, industrial control and signal frequencies
Min/Max recording — captures transient peaks and dips without watching the display; essential for fluctuating or unstable measurements
Temperature measurement with probe, transistor (hFE) test — total component and circuit characterisation from a single instrument
Auto-ranging on L, C and frequency — the meter selects the correct range automatically; no manual range hunting on unfamiliar components
Heavy-duty shockproof construction with holster — field-ready, not just for the bench

name: Full Function Digital Multimeter True RMS 1000V AC/DC 20A
tagline: 1000V True RMS multimeter with LIVE wire testing, NCV and mains frequency measurement — built for high-voltage electrical work.
description: The Vartech V 8222 G is a heavy-duty True RMS digital multimeter designed for high-voltage electrical work where safety is the primary concern. Its standout capability is the combination of LIVE wire testing and Non-Contact Voltage (NCV) detection with simultaneous audio and visual indication — making it the safest choice for panel testing, switchgear inspection and MV/LV distribution work where live conductors must be positively identified before making contact. With 1000 V AC/DC, 20 A and auto-ranging capacitance and frequency measurement, it is the complete instrument for the high-voltage electrical professional.
features: LIVE wire testing with NCV — audio and visual indication simultaneously; positively identifies energised conductors before contact, the most critical safety check in panel work
True RMS up to 1000 V AC/DC — measures at the highest distribution voltages correctly, including on non-sinusoidal waveforms from UPS, generators and inverter systems
Mains frequency measurement in the 1000 V AC range — verify supply frequency directly at HV panel terminals without stepping down to a lower voltage point
Auto-ranging capacitance (6 nF to 20 mF) and frequency (10 Hz to 20 MHz) — broad measurement coverage without manual range selection
20 A AC/DC current measurement — suitable for motor feeds, feeder cables and heavy load testing
Temperature measurement from −20 °C to 1000 °C — extends the meter into thermal and environmental diagnostics
Transistor (hFE), diode and continuity test — component-level diagnosis built into a high-voltage field meter

name: True RMS Digital Multimeter 20000 Counts
tagline: Premium 4½-digit 20000-count True RMS multimeter — 0.1% DC voltage accuracy, conductance measurement and full-function protection.
description: The Vartech V 980 is Vartech's premium handheld True RMS digital multimeter, built for senior engineers, quality control teams and calibration professionals where ordinary accuracy is simply not enough. With 4½ digits and 20,000 counts — ten times the resolution of a standard 2000-count meter — and a DC voltage accuracy of ±0.1%, it delivers near-bench-top precision in a rugged, field-portable body. The addition of conductance measurement, full-function fuse protection and NCV gives it a complete professional specification that very few handheld meters can match.
features: 20,000 counts (4½ digits) — resolves readings to 5 significant figures; detects millivolt-level changes and component variations that standard 2000-count or 6000-count meters cannot see
DC voltage accuracy of ±0.1% — laboratory-grade precision in a handheld body; suitable for calibration checks and reference measurements
Conductance (nS) measurement — evaluate insulation quality, leakage paths and component degradation beyond what resistance alone can reveal; a function found on very few handheld meters
True RMS up to 1000 V DC / 750 V AC and 20 A — covers the full range of power system measurements with correct readings on any waveform
Full-function fuse protection (0.2 A & 20 A) — comprehensive overload protection across all current measurement ranges
Frequency up to 2 MHz, capacitance up to 2 mF, temperature to 1000 °C — a genuinely comprehensive measurement range
NCV detection and torch — safe live-conductor identification in field and panel environments
Transistor (hFE), diode and A/V continuity test — complete component-level diagnostic capability

name: Bench Top Digital Multimeter with PC Interface TRMS 30000 Counts
tagline: Portable bench-top True RMS multimeter — 30000 counts TFT dual display, PC interface, frequency to 300 MHz and Type-C rechargeable battery.
description: The Vartech V 981+ is the most advanced instrument in the Vartech range — a portable bench-top True RMS digital multimeter that brings laboratory measurement capability out of the lab. With a 3.5" colour TFT dual display showing 30,000 counts, PC interface for data logging, frequency measurement up to 300 MHz, a built-in rechargeable battery with Type-C USB charging and advanced functions including data recording, math and Run/Stop — it is built for R&D engineers, laboratory technicians and serious test professionals who refuse to compromise.
features: 30,000-count 3.5" colour TFT dual display — simultaneously displays two measurement values (e.g., voltage and frequency) in high visibility; eliminates the need to switch between functions
PC interface with data recording — log measurement data to a computer for analysis, reporting and quality documentation; essential for production testing and calibration records
Frequency measurement up to 300 MHz — covers RF signals, telecommunications, high-frequency electronics and harmonic analysis far beyond any handheld multimeter
Built-in rechargeable battery with Type-C USB charging — no disposable batteries; charge from any laptop, power bank or USB charger for truly portable bench-top use
Math functions and Run/Stop — perform on-screen calculations, freeze a live measurement or capture data events without connecting to a computer
True RMS auto-ranging from 300 mV to 1000 V DC and 750 V AC with 0.05% best accuracy — bench-top precision in measurement
Temperature measurement from −40 °C to 1000 °C with 0.1 °C resolution — highest resolution temperature capability in the Vartech range
Capacitance up to 300 mF and duty cycle up to 99.9% — the most comprehensive measurement specification in the Vartech multimeter lineup

name: V/mA Calibrator
tagline: Precision V/mA Calibrator with source and measure — 0.015% DC mA accuracy, 24V loop supply and 1 µA resolution for 4–20 mA process calibration.
description: The Vartech MS 7221 is a precision V/mA Calibrator built for instrumentation engineers and process control professionals who calibrate transmitters, PLCs, control loops and process equipment on the industry-standard 4–20 mA signal. With both source and measure capability, ±0.015% DC mA accuracy, 1 µA resolution and a built-in 24 V loop supply that simultaneously powers the transmitter and measures its output — it replaces multiple instruments and eliminates uncertainty from your calibration chain.
features: Source and measure in one instrument — output a precisely known current or voltage signal to calibrate a receiver, or measure the output of a transmitter under test; two functions, one instrument
±0.015% DC mA accuracy with 1 µA resolution — exceeds the accuracy requirement of most industrial 4–20 mA transmitters and control systems; a traceable calibration tool, not just a test meter

24 V loop supply with simultaneous current measurement — power a 2-wire transmitter and measure its 4–20 mA output at the same time, with no external power supply needed; the complete calibration setup in one box
Source or simulate 4–20 mA loop current — calibrate, test or simulate any 4–20 mA process transmitter, positioner, I/P converter or control valve actuator directly from the meter
Measure voltage output signals from PLCs and transmitters up to 10 V — verify 0–10 V and 0–5 V analogue outputs without a separate voltmeter
±0.02% DCV accuracy across 0–100 mV and 0–10 V ranges — precise enough for transducer and sensor signal verification
4½ digit display with high stability design — consistent, repeatable readings across temperature and over time
